/// MODULE

RUNNERS_ARCHIVE

8 of 8 Runner Shells & Scavenger Frames — abilities, stats, strengths, and weaknesses

Sentinel

Defensive specialistRunner Shell

Sentinels control space and shape encounters before they even begin. With a mixture of defensive safeguards, superior intel, and deadly traps, a skilled Sentinel player can control tempo, force hesitation, and turn enemy aggression into deadly mistakes.

Destroyer

Combat specialistRunner Shell

Destroyers seek conflict. Advanced weapons systems, a personal defense barricade, and increased movement abilities allow Destroyers to take the fight to any threat or rival they encounter during a run.

Assassin

Shadow agentRunner Shell

Assassins are lethal shadows. Active Camo and synthetic smoke deployment allows for unseen strikes or the perfect cover during hostile engagements. The ability to move undetected makes Assassins valued allies and lethal enemies.

Recon

Intel specialistRunner Shell

Recons use intel as a weapon. Everything about Recon shells is geared toward identifying threats and providing insight into enemy locations and movements: Mark hostiles. Track wounded targets. Deploy a tracker drone to engage threats in unexpected ways.

Vandal

Combat anarchistRunner Shell

Vandals are troublemakers. Amplified movement abilities help cover ground at incredible speeds, changing any encounter in their favor. Microjets allow a secondary jump to reach higher ground. And a built-in Disrupt Cannon provides instant offense or defense when it is charged and ready to fire.

Thief

Covert acquisitionsRunner Shell

A Thief always keeps their eyes on the prize. Use enhanced visors and piloted drones to remotely locate and acquire valuable loot. Steal from a zone or rival Runners. Then make an escape or push the advantage with the Thief's deployable grapple device.

Triage

Field medicRunner Shell

Triage saves lives. Deployable healing drones and onboard reboot abilities allow Triage Runners and their crews to keep running after taking damage. Mend health and shields and even reboot crewmates at a distance to survive and fight again and again.

Rook

ScavengerScavenger Frame

The Rook frame is designed for scavenger mode, a unique way to play Marathon. As Rook, you'll drop into a match that's already in progress as a solo player. You won't be able to bring a loadout, but you also aren't risking anything, which makes Rook an excellent option for scavengers.

Other players aren't notified when you join, adding tension for everyone. Anything you extract is yours to keep, making Rook ideal for rebuilding inventory after losses or learning maps with zero stakes.

Base Stats

Movement
Heat Capacity
-5
Agility
5
Loot Speed
20
Fall Resistance
0
Combat
Melee Damage
0
Finisher Siphon
0
Recovery
Prime Recovery
0
Tactical Recovery
0
Self-Repair Speed
25
Revive Speed
10
Systems
Hardware
0
Firewall
0
Ping Duration
0

Abilities

PrimeRecuperation

Activate your prototype frame's emergency repair system to slowly restore health. Interrupted when you take damage.

TacticalSignal Mask

Activate a temporary holodisplay mask to deceive UESC forces, making them unaware of your presence. Disrupted when you sprint or take damage.

Strengths

  • ▸Zero risk — you bring nothing in, so you lose nothing
  • ▸Other players don't know you joined the match
  • ▸Blend makes PvE zones safe to traverse
  • ▸Great for learning maps and rebuilding vault after losses

Weaknesses

  • ▸Solo only — no crew allowed
  • ▸No offensive abilities
  • ▸Spawn with basic starting kit only, no vault access
  • ▸Other players can still kill you on sight

Faction Capstone Upgrades

ArachneCAPSTONE I
BOOSTED

ROOK will now start runs with Implants. Arachne will now barter their wares for certain Deluxe Salvage.

ArachneCAPSTONE IV
BOOMSTICK

ROOK will now start runs with a WSTR Combat Shotgun and MIPS Rounds.

CyberAcmeCAPSTONE IV
STIPEND

ROOK will now start runs with a small amount of credits in addition to their basic gear.

CyberAcmeCAPSTONE VI
CARRIER

ROOK will now start runs with a Deluxe Backpack in addition to their basic gear.

NuCaloricCAPSTONE I
RESILIENT

ROOK will now start runs with a Patch Kit and Shield Charge. NuCaloric will now barter their wares for certain Deluxe Salvage.

SekiguchiCAPSTONE I
SPECIALIZED

ROOK will now start runs with Runner Cores. Sekiguchi will now barter their wares for certain Deluxe Salvage.

SekiguchiCAPSTONE V
QUIET_EXIT.EXE

ROOK gains the effects of Signal Mask after activating an exfil.

TraxusCAPSTONE I
PROFICIENT

ROOK will now start runs with an Enhanced weapon. Traxus will now barter their wares for certain Deluxe Salvage.

MIDACAPSTONE I
CASTLING

ROOK will now start runs with a stack of Claymores. MIDA will now barter their wares for certain Deluxe Salvage.

MARATHONMETA
A go-to source for Marathon metas: runners,
weapons, maps, builds, and LFG.
